use_cases: Landing pages for creative portfolios and entertainment sites
Hero sections for music and artist promotional websites
Immersive full-screen backgrounds for SaaS landing pages
Dynamic hero sections for media and content platforms
Eye-catching entry points for creative agency websites
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered hero component featuring advanced shader effects including Perlin noise, FBM (Fractal Brownian Motion), Voronoi patterns, and plasma animations. The component responds to mouse movement for interactive parallax-like effects and includes GSAP-driven timeline animations. Designed for high-impact visual experiences on creative and media-focused landing pages.
